name: Creamy Chilled Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the Graham Cracker Crumbs, sugar, and margarine. Press the mixture onto the bottom of a 9-inch spring-form pan.
2. Soak the gelatin in cold water and stir it over low heat until dissolved.
3. Mix the cream cheese with sugar on an electric mixer at medium speed until well blended. Allow to chill slightly before folding in the whipped cream.
4. Pour the mixture over the crust in the prepared pan. Chill until firm.
5. Top with strawberry halves before serving.
